evaluation: player-level, pooled over all ingested matches; metrics scored by the production model, goals/assists from raw events

cxg_vs_goals.decision: CxG ranks players by goals reliably (Spearman 0.69): usable to shortlist goals on expected rather than realised output.

cxa_vs_assists.decision: CxA does not rank assists well (Spearman 0.39): treat as weak external validity; do not scout on it alone.
